title: suttonia molokaiensis
intro: Suttonia molokaiensis is a rare and endemic plant species native to the islands of Hawaii, specifically found on the islands of Molokai and Oahu. This plant is a type of shrub belonging to the Rubiaceae family and is also known as Ohia Haole or Molokai Suttonia. The medicinal properties of Suttonia molokaiensis include its use as a natural anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create teas, tinctures, and salves, which are said to have various health benefits including wound healing, skin protection, and immune system support.
